'''sazono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyeloplasty|pyeloplasty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyeloplasty|pyeloplasty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sazono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæzeneth|sæzeneth]] || [[word:sæzenej|sæzenej]] || [[word:sæzenesh|sæzenesh]] || [[word:sæzene|sæzene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazozonoth|sazozonoth]] || [[word:sazozonoj|sazozonoj]] || [[word:sazozonosh|sazozonosh]] || [[word:sazozono|sazozono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazonoth|sazonoth]] || [[word:sazonoj|sazonoj]] || [[word:sazonosh|sazonosh]] || [[word:sazono|sazono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazofnoth|sazofnoth]] || [[word:sazofnoj|sazofnoj]] || [[word:sazofnosh|sazofnosh]] || [[word:sazofnof|sazofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sazonotho|sazonotho]] || [[word:sazonojo|sazonojo]] || [[word:sazonosho|sazonosho]] || [[word:sazonoko|sazonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sazonoth|sazonoth]] || [[word:sazonoj|sazonoj]] || [[word:sazonosh|sazonosh]] || [[word:sazono|sazono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sazonothol|sazonothol]] || [[word:sazonojol|sazonojol]] || [[word:sazonoshol|sazonoshol]] || [[word:sazonokol|sazonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sazonothotho|sazonothotho]] || [[word:sazonojojo|sazonojojo]] || [[word:sazonoshosho|sazonoshosho]] || [[word:sazonoko|sazonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sazonothon|sazonothon]] || [[word:sazonojon|sazonojon]] || [[word:sazonoshon|sazonoshon]] || [[word:sazonokon|sazonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sazonothoro|sazonothoro]] || [[word:sazonojoro|sazonojoro]] || [[word:sazonoshoro|sazonoshoro]] || [[word:sazonokoro|sazonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
